stories.title: Travelers Championship Final Preview — Five Players Who Can Win at TPC River Highlands

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Travelers Championship starts Thursday at TPC River Highlands.

$20M. 72 players. No cut.

Scheffler is the +480 favorite. Clark comes in off the US Open. Spieth won here in 2017. Bradley is the defending champ. No McIlroy.

Here we go. ⛳ #TravelersChampionship

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
The PGA Tour's final signature event of 2026 is here.

After this week: no more elite 72-player fields or $20M purses until next year.

Who wins the 2026 Travelers? Our lean: Scheffler. He's due. ⛳ #TravelersChampionship #PGATour

article.headline: Travelers Championship 2026 Preview: Five Players Who Can Win at TPC River Highlands

stories.title: KPMG Women's PGA Championship Preview — Korda Faces Hazeltine's Long Test Starting Thursday

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
KPMG Women's PGA Championship starts tomorrow at Hazeltine.

Korda won the Chevron and US Women's Open in 2026. A win here = 3rd consecutive women's major. Last woman to do it: Inbee Park in 2013.

Hazeltine. 6,800+ yards. Starts Thursday. #KPMG #NellyKorda #LPGA

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Hazeltine is long. 6,800+ yards. Demands precise long iron play.

Korda finished T-3 here in 2019. She knows this course.

Thitikul is the biggest threat. Minjee Lee is the defending champ.

This is the biggest week in women's golf. #KPMG #LPGA

article.headline: KPMG Women's PGA 2026: What Hazeltine Demands — and Why Korda Is Still the Favorite

stories.title: LIV Golf — Saudi Arabia Formally Ends Funding After 2026 Season

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
It is official: Saudi Arabia's PIF will stop funding LIV Golf after the 2026 season ends.

$5B+ invested since 2022. A new independent board is now searching for outside investors.

Four events remain. Every one is uncertain. #LIVGolf #Golf

stories.title: Scheffler's One-Win Season — World No. 1 Needs a Statement at the Travelers

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Scottie Scheffler in 2026:
- No. 1 in the world
- 8 top-5 finishes in 13 starts
- 157 straight weeks ranked No. 1
- Wins: 1

The Travelers Championship starts Thursday. It is time for win No. 2. ⛳ #PGATour #ScottieScheffler

article.headline: Scottie Scheffler's 2026 Paradox: World's Best Player, One Win on the Board

stories.title: Keegan Bradley's Home State Bid — Defending Champion Eyes a Third Travelers Title

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Keegan Bradley grew up in Connecticut. He won the Travelers Championship in 2023 and 2025.

Thursday he tees it up going for title No. 3. At his home event. As the defending champion.

Is anyone more motivated than Bradley this week? #TravelersChampionship

article.headline: Keegan Bradley at the Travelers: Connecticut's Own Defending Champion Eyes History
